text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Apr 29 21:10:53 2014
New Revision: 352649
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352649
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352649/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189103
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-Unicode-Escape/Makefile

Modified: head/textproc/p5-Unicode-Escape/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-Unicode-Escape/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 21:10:48 2014	(r352648)
+++ head/textproc/p5-Unicode-Escape/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 21:10:53 2014	(r352649)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Escape and unescape Unicode characters other than ASCII
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Unicode-String>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-Unicode-String
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
